# Security.InputTrust enumeration

Classification of an input's trust, the §28 trust-boundary primitive (spec §28.1, §28.3, R-28.1-i, R-28.3-b).

```csharp
public enum InputTrust
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Trusted | `0` | From a server the host explicitly trusts. |
| Untrusted | `1` | From an untrusted source; may be adversarial. |
